target_audience: Tech Writers, Open Source Contributors, and DevRel

tasks.title: Dev.to Integration
tasks.description: Implement Dev.to API for publishing articles. Handle Title, Markdown Body, Tags (max 4), Canonical URL, and Publish/Draft status.

tasks.title: Medium Integration
tasks.description: Implement Medium API. Fetch User ID (/v1/me), then POST to (/v1/users/{authorId}/posts). Handle contentFormat (markdown), tags, and publishStatus (public, draft, unlisted).

milestones.title: Editor & Workspace Synergy
milestones.description: Bridge the gap between VS Code text editor and the extension.

tasks.title: Active File Reader
tasks.description: Add a button 'Load Current File' to automatically read the content of the currently active `.md` file in VS Code (vscode.window.activeTextEditor).

tasks.title: Markdown Frontmatter Parser
tasks.description: Extract YAML frontmatter (title, tags, canonical_url) from the markdown file to auto-fill the publishing form.

milestones.title: User Interface Revamp
milestones.description: Prevent clutter by separating Micro-blogging from Long-form publishing.

tasks.title: Dedicated 'Publish Article' Tab
tasks.description: Create a new main tab specifically for articles. Keep it clean with inputs for Title, Tags, Canonical URL, and a large Markdown preview area.

tasks.title: Advanced Hashtag Manager
tasks.description: Build a visual Hashtag Manager in the UI (postponed from v2.x). Allow users to add/remove custom tags and track usage frequency.

tasks.title: Draft vs. Publish Toggle
tasks.description: Add distinct UI buttons/toggles for 'Save as Draft 🟡' vs 'Publish Live 🟢' for Dev.to and Medium.

tasks.title: Separate Social vs. Blog Logic
tasks.description: Ensure the logic for Social Media (text limits, thread splitting) is strictly decoupled from Blogging logic (Markdown parsing, metadata).
